outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected: negative GEX across all expiries amplifies price swings. Dealer short-gamma hedging will accelerate moves away from support levels.
outlook.summary: Market structure is bearish with negative GEX (-8.01B total) creating dealer short-gamma positioning. Spot (653.49) sits directly at 0DTE Max Pain (653), creating a powerful magnetic attraction. The 650 level represents critical multi-expiry structural support with massive put OI. Volatility smirk (1.29-1.45 skew ratio) confirms persistent fear. Watch for potential pinning at Max Pain or breakdown toward 650 support.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Max Pain level at 653. Spot at 653.49 (0.08% distance) creates powerful magnetic attraction. Dealers have strong incentive to pin price here to minimize option payouts.
Multi-expiry structural support. 0DTE: 46,827 PUT OI. WEEKLY: 15,266 PUT OI. MONTHLY: 76,283 PUT OI. Max Pain at 650 for confluence structure. Total GEX negative amplifies importance.
Dominant call resistance. 0DTE: 46,419 CALL OI. MONTHLY: 20,010 CALL OI. Negative GEX environment means dealer hedging could accelerate moves toward this level.
Secondary structural support. 0DTE: 60,374 PUT OI (highest single strike). WEEKLY: 23,094 PUT OI. MONTHLY: 100,416 PUT OI. High volume confirmation.
Mixed structure near spot. 0DTE: 27,487 CALL OI + 20,124 PUT OI. WEEKLY: 18,099 CALL OI. Creates pinning friction with conflicting dealer interests.
Monthly resistance ceiling with 34,163 CALL OI. Extreme put/call ratio (4.09) in monthly suggests limited upside potential. Secondary target if momentum builds.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility risk: Monthly negative GEX (-10.33B) conflicts with 0DTE stability. Spot hovering above gamma flip increases directional probability. Bearish skew (1.41-1.46) and extreme PCR (3.29 monthly) suggest downside pressure.
outlook.summary: Market positioned at critical inflection with spot (6603.5) just above 0DTE gamma flip (6597.46). Dealers long gamma in short-term providing stability, but MONTHLY negative GEX (-10.33B) signals potential volatility expansion. Strong bearish smirk skew across all expiries with extreme PCR readings indicates heavy put hedging. 6400 RESONANCE level is the anchor - significant PUT WALL in ALL three expiries. Max Pain at 6550 acts as downside magnet. Watch for rejection at 6650-6750 zone or breakdown toward 6550.

levels.motivazione: CRITICAL: Significant PUT OI in ALL 3 expiries (0DTE: 9,074, WEEKLY: 7,752 highest, MONTHLY: 23,612 highest). Ultimate structural support. Extreme PCR (3.29 monthly) confirms heavy institutional hedging.
CRITICAL: Spot (6603.5) only 6 pts above flip. Dealer gamma neutral zone. Break below triggers acceleration. 0DTE positive GEX (16.19B) provides support while above.
levels.sintesiOperativa: PIVOT: Hold for bullish, break = short

levels.motivazione: Highest 0DTE CALL OI (18,400). Major dealer short gamma resistance. Combined with 6775 (13,987) creates strong resistance band.
CONFLUENCE: WEEKLY (4,244) + MONTHLY (16,660 highest CALL). Structural ceiling for intermediate term. Bearsish skew validates weakness at highs.
0DTE Max Pain level, 0.8% below spot. MM target to minimize payouts. Put OI (5,529) + Call OI (4,622) create magnetic attraction zone.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE CALL (8,856) + MONTHLY CALL (7,013). Immediate resistance above spot. Combined with 6660 (9,551) creates friction band.
Massive volume spike: 82,158 VOL vs 8,809 OI (ratio 9.3x). Unusual institutional activity. Strong support zone near Max Pain.
At-the-money with massive CALL VOL (90,848) + PUT OI (4,153). High gamma zone creating price compression. Dealers delta-hedging heavily.
